temporal_description:
A high-angle, wide shot captures a dimly lit, formal room, possibly an interrogation room. Three men are seated around a large, dark table. On the far side of the table, two men sit side-by-side; one is in a white collared shirt and tie, and the other wears a blue denim shirt. Across from them, with his back to the camera, a third man in a dark jacket sits alone. The room has dark wood paneling and a parquet floor. Large windows with blinds are visible in the background, casting a cool, greenish light into the otherwise dark space. A white logo with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The audio is filled with a low, sustained, and ominous musical drone that creates a tense and suspenseful atmosphere. The sound is deep and resonant, evoking a sense of unease and anticipation, as if building up to a significant and serious moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the unsettling music to dominate the soundscape.

The camera cuts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of the man in the dark jacket. He is wearing glasses and looking down intently, his face partially illuminated. In the blurred background, a white briefcase sits on the table. The "风行网" logo remains in the top right corner.

The camera angle shifts to a medium close-up of the man in the denim shirt. He looks down with a somber expression, his face also cast in a cool, shadowy light. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" logo is still present in the top right corner.
